# JavaScript Best Practices

This repository keeps the full JavaScript guidance in
[the guide under docs/guides](../docs/guides/JAVASCRIPT_BEST_PRACTICES.md).
This `.github/` copy exists so workflow reviews and Copilot-oriented guidance can
discover the rule in the expected location without duplicating the full
document.

## Source of Truth

Use [the docs/guides version](../docs/guides/JAVASCRIPT_BEST_PRACTICES.md) as
the authoritative guide.

## Related Guides

- [TDD_GUIDE.md](./TDD_GUIDE.md) - test-driven development workflow
- [CODE_REVIEW_GUIDE.md](./CODE_REVIEW_GUIDE.md) - code review standards
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) - contribution workflow and project rules
